name: Patient 36
history: Elevated stress from financial difficulties and relationship instability. Heavy workload covering absent coworker. Friends often have crises. Considering asking parents for therapy cost help.
intermediate_belief: I'm constantly rescuing others while my own life falls apart.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm drowning in others' needs with no support for my own.
coping_strategies: Financial monitoring, considering parental help, managing multiple demands.
situation: Discovered that their bank balance was lower than expected.
auto_thought: I can't even manage my own finances while taking care of everyone else.
behavior: Check bank balance and discover financial shortfall.
